task.title: Notification Query API
task.description: Implement GET endpoints for notification status and event history

implementation.details:
1. Add GET /api/v1/notifications/:id endpoint
2. Implement GET /api/v1/notifications/:id/events
3. Add pagination and filtering
4. Include performance optimization with indexes
5. Add request validation and error handling

decision.description: Default page size for notification queries

task.acceptance_criteria: Can retrieve notification by ID, events endpoint returns delivery history, pagination works correctly
